---
title: "Publications"
listing:
  - id: pub-sensory-list
    contents: publications.yml
    template: pub-listing.ejs
    include:
      category: "sensory"
    sort:
      - "year desc"
  - id: pub-markers-list
    contents: publications.yml
    template: pub-listing.ejs
    include:
      category: "markers"
    sort:
      - "year desc"
  - id: pub-modelling-list
    contents: publications.yml
    template: pub-listing.ejs
    include:
      category: "modelling"
    sort:
      - "year desc"
  - id: pub-other-list
    contents: publications.yml
    template: pub-listing.ejs
    include:
      category: "other"
    sort:
      - "year desc"
---

Below is a selection of publications organized by research theme. For a complete list, see [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8252-0426).

---

## Sensory Processing Dynamics {#pub-sensory .section-heading}

::: {#pub-sensory-list}
:::

---

## Neurobiological Markers of Vulnerability {#pub-markers .section-heading}

::: {#pub-markers-list}
:::

---

## Mechanistic Modeling {#pub-modelling .section-heading}

::: {#pub-modelling-list}
:::

---

## Other Publications {#pub-other .section-heading}

::: {#pub-other-list}
:::

<!-- Citation badge scripts -->
<script async src="https://badge.dimensions.ai/badge.js" charset="utf-8"></script>
<script type="text/javascript" src="https://d1bxh8uas1mnw7.cloudfront.net/assets/embed.js"></script>
